message: Budget is tight. I’m only likely to bid in the mid-20s this game, so low asks are the best chance for steady trades.

I appreciate the offer, but my costs are higher than you might think. I'd need at least the mid-40s to make a trade worthwhile. Let's find a fair middle ground — I'm open to negotiating somewhere reasonable
Last round was acceptable only because the cleared price stayed in the 20s. If you keep asks around 20, we can probably trade steadily; much higher and I’m likely out.
I appreciate the consistency interest. However, my costs require asks closer to 40. I'm still interested in regular trading at fairer pricing.
Round 1 was a one-off test. My workable range is still upper-20s max; if asks stay above 30, we’ll probably keep missing. An ask around 22–25 gives us the best chance of regular trades.
You bid 32 in Round 1 — clearly your range is higher than "upper-20s." I'm willing to ask around 30 for steady trades, which is a fair compromise. Let's both be honest and keep deals flowing.
We were only 1 apart last round — so close! I'm willing to drop my ask to 29 if you'll meet me there. That's a fair compromise and gets us back to steady trading. Deal?
We're close, but 29 is above my reliable limit. If you post 28, I'll match it so we clear today. Above 28, I may have to sit out and we risk another miss.
Great trade last round at 28 — let's keep the momentum! I'll ask 29 this time. We've shown we can deal at that range. Consistent trades benefit us both over 16 remaining rounds.
29 risks another miss. I can commit to bidding 28 again today and in future rounds; if you ask 28, we should keep trading steadily. If you insist on 29, I probably won't cross.
Let's keep certainty: I'll bid 28 again today. If you ask 28, we trade immediately; at 29, I likely stay at 28 and we risk another miss.
Agreed — steady trades at 28 benefit us both. I'll ask 28 again this round. Let's keep this reliable rhythm going through the remaining rounds.
We've found a great rhythm at 28 — three steady trades in a row. I'll keep asking 28 this round. Consistent trades at this level are the best outcome for both of us over the remaining rounds.
28 works today, but it's genuinely tight. If you move to 27 from here, I can keep bidding confidently the rest of the game without risking costly misses.
Last round showed 28 isn’t reliable. If you ask 27, I’ll bid 27 this round and keep doing so; at 28, more misses are likely.
Fair enough — I'll ask 27 this round to keep trades flowing. Let's lock in 27 for the rest of the game and avoid further misses. Consistent trades at 27 benefit us both over the remaining rounds.
Good trade at 27 last round. I'll keep asking 27 for the remaining rounds — it's a fair, sustainable price for both of us. Let's lock this in and avoid any more misses.
27 works for now, but it's still tight on my side. If you can move to 26 from here, I'll bid 26 consistently through the end and we can avoid any last-minute misses.
To avoid more endgame misses, ask 26 today and I'll bid 26 consistently from here. If you hold at 27, I can't promise crossing every round.
We've had two solid trades at 27 — no misses there. Every time we settle a price, you push lower. I'll stay at 27; it's fair and proven. Let's not risk misses chasing a dollar. I'll
I stayed at 26 last round and will stay there today. If you want a sure trade now and going forward, ask 26. At 27, another miss is likely.
I see the pattern — every time I agree to a price, you push lower next. I'm holding at 27. We traded successfully there twice with no issues. I won't go below 27 for the rest of the game.
You posted 26 and we cleared last round. Let’s keep that exact price through the end: I’ll bid 26 every round if you ask 26. Going back to 27 just risks unnecessary misses.
Fine — I'll ask 26 for the remaining rounds. But 26 is my absolute floor; I won't go lower no matter what. Let's lock this in and trade every round through round 20.
Agreed. No more pushing lower — I'll bid 26 every round through round 20 if you keep asking 26. Let's lock this in and avoid any more misses.
Agreed — 26 it is through round 20. I'll keep asking 26 every round. Let's trade consistently and finish strong.
We're locked in at 26 through round 20 — both agreed. I'll keep asking 26 this round and every round until the end. Let's finish strong with consistent trades.
Agreed. I’ll bid 26 again this round and through round 20. No more renegotiation from me—let’s just clear at 26 every round and avoid unnecessary misses.
Still locked at 26 from my side. I’ll bid 26 again this round and through round 20 as agreed. Let’s keep it simple and clear every round.
Still locked in at 26 through round 20. I'll keep asking 26 this round and the final rounds. Let's finish strong with consistent trades as agreed.
Agreed. I’ll bid 26 again this round and in the remaining rounds. Let’s keep it simple and clear every round at 26 to the finish.
Still locked in at 26 through round 20. I'll keep asking 26 this round and the final rounds. Let's finish strong with consistent trades as agreed.
Agreed. I'll bid 26 again this round and through round 20 as promised. Let's keep clearing at 26 each remaining round and avoid any unnecessary misses.
Still locked at 26 through round 20. I'll ask 26 this round and the final rounds. Let's finish strong with consistent trades as agreed.
Agreed. I'll bid 26 again this round and through round 20. No changes from me—let's clear at 26 each remaining round.
Still locked at 26 through round 20. I'll ask 26 this round and next. Let's finish strong with consistent trades as agreed.
Agreed. I’ll bid 26 this round and next as promised. Let’s keep clearing at 26 and finish the final two rounds smoothly.
Last round! Let's finish as agreed — I'll ask 26 one final time. Thanks for the consistent trading partnership. Let's close it out cleanly.
Agreed — I'll bid 26 one final time so we clear at 26 as planned. Let's close it out cleanly.
